name: Corner Guard — L / U Shape
shortDescription: Rubber corner guard protecting building corners, pillars and racking from vehicle contact.
longDescription: L-shape and U-shape rubber corner guards fit over building corners, pillars and racking uprights in warehouses and loading areas, absorbing glancing contact from forklifts and delivery vehicles that would otherwise chip masonry or bend racking.

images.alt: Corner Guard — L / U Shape supplied by Expert Safety Solutions, Vadodara

specs.label: Use case
specs.value: Corner and pillar protection in warehouses and loading areas
